responsibilities: Conduct secondary research using premium databases to support consultant requests on industries, companies, and markets
Curate and maintain knowledge repositories ensuring case studies, reports, and best practices are accurately tagged and searchable
Develop industry primers and market landscape overviews to accelerate onboarding for new client engagements
Respond to ad hoc research requests from consulting teams, synthesizing findings into concise, actionable briefs
Manage subscriptions and access to external data sources and research databases used across the consulting practice
Train new consultants on research tools, knowledge management systems, and best practices for information retrieval
Collaborate with practice leaders to capture and document engagement learnings for firm-wide knowledge sharing
Monitor industry news and competitive developments to proactively flag relevant insights to client-serving teams
